fuel_pricing.name: Fuel Pricing
fuel_pricing.description: Fuel pricing policies, subsidies, and pump price changes affecting petroleum products in Nigeria. Includes discussions about petrol, diesel, gasoline pricing, fuel subsidy removal or implementation, pump price adjustments, and economic impact of fuel pricing decisions by the government and NNPC. Covers both increases and decreases in fuel prices, subsidy policies, and public reactions to pricing changes.

presidential_announcements.name: Presidential Announcements
presidential_announcements.description: Official statements, declarations, and announcements made by the President of Nigeria. Includes presidential speeches, policy announcements, executive orders, state of the nation addresses, press conferences, and public statements from the presidency. Covers major policy decisions, cabinet appointments, national addresses, and presidential communications to the public.

military_operations.name: Military Operations
military_operations.description: Military activities, operations, and defense matters in Nigeria. Includes army operations, troop deployments, defense strategies, military exercises, armed forces activities, combat operations, and national security operations. Covers both domestic and international military engagements, defense policy, and security operations.

education_funding.name: Education Funding
education_funding.description: Education budget, funding, and financial allocations for educational institutions in Nigeria. Includes school funding, university budgets, educational grants, scholarship programs, tuition fees, and government allocations to education sector. Covers primary, secondary, and tertiary education funding, educational infrastructure investments, and financial support for students.

asuu_strikes.name: ASUU Strikes
asuu_strikes.description: Academic Staff Union of Universities strikes and negotiations in Nigeria. Includes ASUU industrial actions, lecturer strikes, university staff disputes, academic union negotiations, and university closure due to strikes. Covers strike negotiations, demands, resolutions, and impact on higher education in Nigeria.

healthcare_crisis.name: Healthcare Crisis
healthcare_crisis.description: Healthcare system problems, hospital failures, medical shortages, and health crises in Nigeria. Includes hospital infrastructure issues, medical equipment shortages, healthcare funding problems, and public health emergencies. Covers healthcare service delivery challenges, medical personnel shortages, and health system failures.

security_threats.name: Security Threats
security_threats.description: Security breaches, terrorist attacks, crime waves, and insecurity issues in Nigeria. Includes banditry, kidnapping, terrorism, insurgency, crime, security challenges, and law enforcement responses. Covers security incidents, threat assessments, security operations, and public safety concerns.

budget_allocation.name: Budget Allocation
budget_allocation.description: National budget allocation, distribution, and fiscal planning in Nigeria. Includes budget announcements, budget breakdown, sectoral allocations, budget implementation, and government spending. Covers annual budget presentations, budget debates, fiscal policy, and allocation of resources across ministries and sectors.

infrastructure_projects.name: Infrastructure Projects
infrastructure_projects.description: Infrastructure development projects, construction, and public works in Nigeria. Includes road construction, bridge building, railway projects, airport development, and public infrastructure initiatives. Covers infrastructure planning, construction progress, project completion, and infrastructure investments.

corruption_cases.name: Corruption Cases
corruption_cases.description: Corruption scandals, fraud cases, and anti-corruption efforts in Nigeria. Includes embezzlement, bribery, financial fraud, corruption investigations, EFCC cases, and accountability measures. Covers corruption allegations, investigations, prosecutions, and anti-corruption initiatives.

power_outages.name: Power Outages
power_outages.description: Electricity supply problems, power outages, and energy shortages in Nigeria. Includes blackouts, load shedding, electricity generation issues, transmission problems, and power sector challenges. Covers power supply disruptions, energy crises, and electricity infrastructure failures.

unemployment.name: Unemployment
unemployment.description: Unemployment issues, job creation, and employment challenges in Nigeria. Includes youth unemployment, job market conditions, employment statistics, job creation initiatives, and labor market problems. Covers unemployment rates, job opportunities, and employment policy.

inflation.name: Inflation
inflation.description: Inflation rates, price increases, and economic inflation concerns in Nigeria. Includes consumer price index, inflation statistics, cost of living increases, price hikes, and economic inflation impacts. Covers inflation trends, monetary policy responses, and inflation effects on citizens.

foreign_affairs.name: Foreign Affairs
foreign_affairs.description: Diplomatic relations, international cooperation, and foreign policy matters involving Nigeria. Includes diplomatic visits, international agreements, foreign relations, consular services, and Nigeria's role in international organizations. Covers bilateral and multilateral relations, diplomatic engagements, and foreign policy decisions.

agriculture_food_security.name: Agriculture & Food Security
agriculture_food_security.description: Agricultural policies, food security, farming, and agricultural development in Nigeria. Includes crop production, livestock management, food supply, agricultural funding, farming initiatives, and food security programs. Covers agricultural productivity, food availability, and agricultural sector challenges.

education_institutions_agencies.name: Education Institutions & Agencies
education_institutions_agencies.description: Government agencies, boards, and regulatory bodies overseeing education in Nigeria, including the National Universities Commission (NUC), Universal Basic Education Commission (UBEC), TETFund, JAMB, WAEC, NECO, and SUBEB. Also includes discussions about specific universities, polytechnics, colleges of education, and unity schools.

education_policies_frameworks.name: Education Policies & Frameworks
education_policies_frameworks.description: Educational laws, acts, policies, and regulatory frameworks governing the Nigerian education sector. Includes the National Policy on Education, education funding acts, university autonomy bills, student loan policies, and government white papers on education reform.

education_programs_initiatives.name: Education Programs & Initiatives
education_programs_initiatives.description: Government-led educational programs, intervention schemes, and scholarship initiatives. Includes the Almajiri Education Programme, Safe School Initiative, Home Grown School Feeding Programme, BESDA (Better Education Service Delivery for All), and various federal and state scholarship boards.

exams_assessments.name: Exams & Assessments
exams_assessments.description: Standardized testing, entrance examinations, and academic assessments in Nigeria. Covers UTME, POST-UTME, WASSCE, NECO, NABTEB, Common Entrance Examination, and issues related to exam malpractice, result releases, and cut-off marks.

education_levels_school_types.name: Education Levels & School Types
education_levels_school_types.description: Discussions specific to different tiers of the education system: Early Childhood Care and Development (ECCD), Primary Education, Secondary Education (JSS/SSS), Tertiary Education, Vocational/Technical Education, and Special Needs Education.

curriculum_academics.name: Curriculum & Academics
curriculum_academics.description: The content of education, teaching standards, syllabus, and academic subjects. Includes discussions on STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, Math), entrepreneurship education, indigenous language teaching, and curriculum updates by NERDC.

education_stakeholders_roles.name: Education Stakeholders & Roles
education_stakeholders_roles.description: Key actors in the education sector including students, teachers, lecturers, Vice-Chancellors, Rectors, parents, and unions like ASUU (Academic Staff Union of Universities), NUT (Nigeria Union of Teachers), NASU, and SSANU. Covers strikes, salary disputes, and welfare.

education_geography_administration.name: Education Geography & Administration
education_geography_administration.description: Administrative structures and geographic distribution of education. Includes Local Government Education Authorities (LGEA), State Universal Basic Education Boards (SUBEB), school districts, catchment areas, and educationally disadvantaged states (EDS).

national_food_security_supply.name: National Food Security & Supply Status
national_food_security_supply.description: Availability and accessibility of food in Nigeria. Covers national grain reserves, hunger levels, risk of famine, food sufficiency, and the overall state of food security in the country.

staple_crops_production.name: Staple Crops & Agricultural Production
staple_crops_production.description: Cultivation and harvest of major Nigerian staple crops. Includes Rice, Maize, Cassava, Yams, Sorghum, Millet, Wheat, and general crop production output and harvest reports.

farmer_sentiment_distress.name: Farmer Sentiment & Distress
farmer_sentiment_distress.description: The welfare and challenges of Nigerian farmers. Covers farmer poverty, debt, displacement due to conflict (herdsmen/farmer clashes), lack of support, and general livelihood struggles.

agricultural_inputs.name: Agricultural Inputs: Fertilizer, Seeds & Fuel
agricultural_inputs.description: Access to and cost of essential farming inputs. Includes Fertilizer (NPK, Urea), improved seeds, seedlings, tractors, farm machinery, and fuel/diesel costs for mechanized farming.

food_prices_market_dynamics.name: Food Prices & Market Dynamics
food_prices_market_dynamics.description: Market prices of food items and inflation. Covers the cost of a bag of rice, garri, tomatoes, onions, market inflation, rising food costs, and consumer purchasing power regarding food.

climate_agricultural_disasters.name: Climate & Agricultural Disasters
climate_agricultural_disasters.description: Environmental impact on agriculture. Includes floods destroying farmlands, drought, desertification, climate change effects, and pest infestations (locusts, quelea birds).

government_policy_programs.name: Government Policy & Agricultural Programs
government_policy_programs.description: Government intervention in agriculture. Includes the Anchor Borrowers Programme, CBN agricultural loans, Green Imperative, Ministry of Agriculture initiatives, and agricultural policy frameworks.

livestock_fisheries.name: Livestock & Fisheries
livestock_fisheries.description: Animal husbandry and aquaculture. Covers Cattle rearing, Poultry farming, Fishery, Piggery, Ranching, Grazing reserves, NLTP (National Livestock Transformation Plan), and poultry feed costs.

trade_supply_chain.name: Trade & Agricultural Supply Chain
trade_supply_chain.description: Import and export of agricultural goods. Includes food importation bans, border closures affecting food trade, export of cash crops (Cocoa, Cashew, Sesame), and logistics of moving food from farm to market.

public_unrest_food_related.name: Public Unrest & Political Risk (Food-Related)
public_unrest_food_related.description: Social unrest driven by food scarcity or cost. Includes food riots, looting of palliatives or warehouses, protests over hunger, and political instability tied to food security.

health_governance_policy.name: Governance & Health Policy
health_governance_policy.description: Strategic leadership and regulation of the health sector. Includes the National Health Act, health financing, budget allocation for health, NHIS (National Health Insurance Scheme), Basic Health Care Provision Fund (BHCPF), and Ministry of Health policies.

disease_outbreaks_surveillance.name: Disease Outbreaks & Surveillance
disease_outbreaks_surveillance.description: Monitoring and response to epidemic-prone diseases. Covers Lassa Fever, Cholera, COVID-19, Meningitis, Monkeypox, Ebola, and NCDC (Nigeria Centre for Disease Control) surveillance activities.

endemic_infectious_diseases.name: Endemic & Infectious Diseases
endemic_infectious_diseases.description: Ongoing management of burden diseases. Includes Malaria, Tuberculosis (TB), HIV/AIDS, Neglected Tropical Diseases (NTDs), and treatment programs for these conditions.

antimicrobial_resistance.name: Antimicrobial Resistance & Hospital Infections
antimicrobial_resistance.description: Issues related to drug resistance and hospital safety. Covers antibiotic resistance, superbugs, rational use of medicines, and hospital-acquired infections.

hospitals_healthcare_facilities.name: Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities
hospitals_healthcare_facilities.description: Infrastructure and state of medical centers. Includes Teaching Hospitals, Federal Medical Centres (FMCs), General Hospitals, Primary Healthcare Centers (PHCs), hospital equipment, and facility conditions.

health_workforce.name: Health Workforce
health_workforce.description: Human resources for health. Includes Doctors, Nurses, Pharmacists, Lab Scientists, brain drain ('Japa'), shortage of staff, and recruitment of health workers.

workforce_strikes_protests.name: Workforce Strikes & Protests
workforce_strikes_protests.description: Industrial actions by health unions. Covers strikes by NMA (Nigerian Medical Association), NARD (National Association of Resident Doctors), JOHESU, and demands for salary arrears or hazard allowance.

drugs_pharmaceuticals.name: Drugs & Pharmaceuticals
drugs_pharmaceuticals.description: Regulation and supply of medicines. Includes NAFDAC activities, fake/substandard drugs, drug supply chains, pharmacy regulation, and cost of medication.

vaccines_immunization.name: Vaccines & Immunization
vaccines_immunization.description: Vaccination programs and coverage. Includes NPHCDA (National Primary Health Care Development Agency), routine immunization, polio eradication, measles vaccine, and vaccine storage/cold chain.

maternal_child_health.name: Maternal & Child Health
maternal_child_health.description: Health of mothers and children. Covers maternal mortality, infant mortality, antenatal care, delivery services, family planning, and reproductive health.

nutrition_food_security.name: Nutrition & Food Security
nutrition_food_security.description: Nutritional status of the population. Covers malnutrition, stunting in children, wasting, micronutrient deficiency, and severe acute malnutrition (SAM).

public_sentiment_complaints.name: Public Sentiment & Complaints
public_sentiment_complaints.description: General public feedback on health services. Includes negligence, poor attitude of staff, rejection of patients (especially gunshot victims), and patient satisfaction.

health_misinformation_rumors.name: Health Misinformation & Rumors
health_misinformation_rumors.description: Spread of false health information. Includes vaccine hesitancy, fake cures, herbal remedy myths, and conspiracy theories affecting public health.

health_emergencies_disasters.name: Health Emergencies & Disasters
health_emergencies_disasters.description: Mass casualty events and acute health crises. Includes building collapses, explosions, mass accidents requiring emergency response, and ambulance services.

transport_governance.name: Ministry, Leadership & Governance
transport_governance.description: Activities of the Federal Ministry of Transportation. Includes policy announcements, ministerial inspections, transport budgets, and regulatory frameworks governing the sector.

road_transport_highways.name: Road Transport & Highways
road_transport_highways.description: Condition and management of federal roads and highways. Covers potholes, road rehabilitation, FERMA (Federal Roads Maintenance Agency), and major expressways (Lagos-Ibadan, Abuja-Kano).

rail_transport.name: Rail Transport
rail_transport.description: Railway services and infrastructure. Includes NRC (Nigeria Railway Corporation), train schedules, ticket handling, Abuja-Kaduna train, Lagos-Ibadan rail, and Warri-Itakpe line.

aviation_airports.name: Aviation & Airports
aviation_airports.description: Air travel sector. Covers FAAN, NCAA, airport conditions (MMIA, Nnamdi Azikiwe), flight delays, airline operations (Air Peace, etc.), and aviation fuel scarcity.

maritime_ports.name: Maritime, Ports & Logistics
maritime_ports.description: Sea transport and ports authority. Includes NPA (Nigerian Ports Authority), NIMASA, Apapa Port, Tin Can Island, port congestion, customs clearance, and waterways.

transport_safety_accidents.name: Safety, Accidents & Emergencies
transport_safety_accidents.description: Transport safety and road crashes. Includes FRSC (Federal Road Safety Corps), road accidents, tanker explosions, train derailments, and air crashes/incidents.

infrastructure_projects_delivery.name: Infrastructure Projects & Delivery
infrastructure_projects_delivery.description: Major transport infrastructure projects. Covers completion of rail lines, new airport terminals, bridge construction, and project timelines.

urban_transport_fares.name: Urban Transport, Fares & Green Mobility
urban_transport_fares.description: Intra-city commuting and costs. Includes transport fares (T-fare), BRT buses, Okada/Keke bans, Danfo, CNG buses (Compressed Natural Gas), and electric vehicle initiatives.

transport_labour_unions.name: Public Sentiment, Labour & Media
transport_labour_unions.description: Transport unions and worker sentiment. Covers NURTW (National Union of Road Transport Workers), RTEAN, NARTO, transport strikes, and public complaints.

transport_crisis_signals.name: Early Warning & Crisis Signals
transport_crisis_signals.description: Security risks in transport. Includes kidnapping on highways, attacks on trains, robbery in traffic (one chance), and blockades of roads.

youth_sports_governance.name: Ministry Leadership & Governance
youth_sports_governance.description: Governance of the Youth and Sports Development sector. Includes Ministry policies, Minister's activities, sports federation elections, and administrative decisions.

youth_affairs_core.name: Youth Affairs Core Issues
youth_affairs_core.description: General issues affecting the youth demographic. Includes youth demographics, 'Not Too Young To Run', youth inclusion in governance, and national youth conferences.

youth_employment_empowerment.name: Youth Employment, Skills & Empowerment
youth_employment_empowerment.description: Economic opportunities for youth. Covers unemployment, N-Power, skills acquisition programs, tech empowerment, entrepreneurship grants, and job creation.

youth_education_nysc.name: Education to Employment & NYSC
youth_education_nysc.description: Transition from school to work and National Youth Service Corps. Includes NYSC orientation camps, PPA (Place of Primary Assignment), corpers' allowance (allawee), and graduate employability.

youth_protests_activism.name: Youth Protests, Activism & Movements
youth_protests_activism.description: Youth-led social movements and demonstrations. Includes EndSARS, protests against police brutality, student protests, and online activism.

youth_social_risks.name: Mental Health, Drugs & Social Risks
youth_social_risks.description: Social challenges facing youth. Includes drug abuse (Codeine, Tramadol, Mkpuru Mmiri), cybercrime (Yahoo Yahoo), cultism, and mental health struggles.

sports_national_international.name: Sports: National & International
sports_national_international.description: General participation in major sporting events. Includes Olympics, Commonwealth Games, All Africa Games, and National Sports Festival.

football_high_sensitivity.name: Football: High Sensitivity Area
football_high_sensitivity.description: Football-specific discussions, which are highly emotional in Nigeria. Covers Super Eagles, Super Falcons, NFF (Nigeria Football Federation), World Cup qualifiers, AFCON, and local leagues (NPFL).

other_major_sports.name: Other Major Sports
other_major_sports.description: Non-football sports with significant following. Includes Basketball (D'Tigress/D'Tigers), Athletics (Track & Field), Boxing, and Table Tennis.

sports_infrastructure.name: Sports Infrastructure & Facilities
sports_infrastructure.description: State of stadiums and training facilities. Includes National Stadium Lagos/Abuja, decaying infrastructure, pitch conditions, and renovation projects.

sports_funding_integrity.name: Sports Funding, Governance & Integrity
sports_funding_integrity.description: Financial management in sports. Covers corruption allegations, funding for tournaments, unpaid match bonuses, and leadership tussles in federations.

athletes_officials_welfare.name: Athletes, Coaches & Officials
athletes_officials_welfare.description: Welfare of sports personnel. Includes hiring/firing of coaches (e.g., Super Eagles coach), player welfare, and treatment of athletes.

fan_sentiment_risk.name: Fan Sentiment, Violence & Matchday Risks
fan_sentiment_risk.description: Crowd behavior and safety. Includes stadium violence, hooliganism, pitch invasion, and angry fan reactions.

youth_digital_trends.name: Social Media & Influencer Monitoring
youth_digital_trends.description: Youth culture on digital platforms. Includes trends on Twitter/X, TikTok, influential voices, and viral challenges.

youth_media_reputation.name: Media Reputation & Crisis Signals
youth_media_reputation.description: Public perception of the ministry/minister in media. Includes press releases, controversies, and viral negative stories.

youth_regional_demographics.name: Regional & Demographic Signals
youth_regional_demographics.description: Youth issues specific to regions (North vs South) or demographics (Rural vs Urban youth).

youth_future_trends.name: Future Facing & Strategic Signals
youth_future_trends.description: Emerging long-term issues for youth. Includes future of work, tech adoption, and generational shifts (Gen Z).

youth_early_warning.name: Early Warning & Escalation Keywords
youth_early_warning.description: Keywords indicating imminent youth unrest or crisis. Includes mobilization for protests, threats of violence, or hashtags calling for action.

finance_leadership_governance.name: Leadership & Governance
finance_leadership_governance.description: Leadership of the Federal Ministry of Finance and related agencies. Includes the Minister of Finance, CBN Governor, monetary policy decisions, and economic management team activities.

macroeconomic_indicators.name: Macroeconomic Indicators
macroeconomic_indicators.description: Key indicators of the Nigerian economy. Covers inflation rate, GDP growth, exchange rate (Naira vs Dollar), external reserves, and unemployment rate.

revenue_taxation.name: Revenue & Taxation
revenue_taxation.description: Government revenue generation and tax administration. Includes FIRS (Federal Inland Revenue Service), VAT, Company Income Tax, Stamp Duty, and TSA (Treasury Single Account).

development_finance_institutions.name: Development Finance Institutions
development_finance_institutions.description: State-owned financial institutions supporting development. Includes Bank of Industry (BOI), NEXIM Bank, Development Bank of Nigeria (DBN), and Bank of Agriculture interventions.

digital_finance_fintech.name: Digital Finance & Fintech
digital_finance_fintech.description: Financial technology and digital currency. Covers eNaira, cashless policy, crypto regulation, fintech startups, and electronic payment systems.

infrastructure_priority_sectors.name: Infrastructure & Priority Sectors Funding
infrastructure_priority_sectors.description: Financing for major infrastructure and critical sectors. Includes Sukuk bonds, Eurobonds, sovereign debt for rail/power projects, and infrastructure funds.

nigeria_fiscal_terms.name: Nigeria-Specific Fiscal Terms
nigeria_fiscal_terms.description: Specific terminology related to Nigerian fiscal management. Includes FAAC (Federation Account Allocation Committee), budget deficit, debt servicing, and subsidy removal impact.

interior_core_identity.name: Ministry of Interior – Core Identity
interior_core_identity.description: General activities and leadership of the Ministry of Interior. Includes the Minister's engagements, policy announcements, and strategic direction of the ministry.

interior_strategic_reform.name: Ministry Strategic & Reform Agenda
interior_strategic_reform.description: Reform initiatives within the ministry. Includes passport process automation, prison decongestion reforms, and internal security strategy.

interior_digital_assets.name: Official Digital Assets & Hashtags
interior_digital_assets.description: Official online presence and campaigns. Includes monitoring of official hashtags like #NewPassportProcess, #InteriorReform, and viral social media discussions.

nigeria_immigration_service.name: Nigeria Immigration Service (NIS)
nigeria_immigration_service.description: Immigration and border control. Covers passport issuance, backlog clearance, visa on arrival, boarder patrol, and illegal migration.

nigerian_correctional_service.name: Nigerian Correctional Service (NCoS)
nigerian_correctional_service.description: Prison management and inmate welfare. Covers jailbreaks, prison congestion, inmate rehabilitation, and the change from 'Prisons' to 'Correctional Service'.

nscdc_civil_defence.name: Nigeria Security & Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC)
nscdc_civil_defence.description: Civil defence and critical infrastructure protection. Covers Agro-Rangers, pipeline vandalism, protecting national assets, and private guard regulation.

federal_fire_service.name: Federal Fire Service
federal_fire_service.description: Fire prevention and emergency response. Covers market fires, fire outbreaks, fire safety regulation, and equipment procurement.

cdcfib_oversight.name: CDCFIB Oversight Body
cdcfib_oversight.description: Civil Defence, Correctional, Fire and Immigration Services Board. Covers recruitment, promotion, and discipline of officers in the paramilitary agencies.

nigeria_evisa_system.name: Nigeria E-Visa System
nigeria_evisa_system.description: Electronic visa processing and administration. Covers online visa applications, business visa on arrival functionality, and tourist e-visas.

expatriate_residence_permit.name: Expatriate Residence Permit (CERPAC)
expatriate_residence_permit.description: Regulations for foreigners in Nigeria. Covers CERPAC (Combined Expatriate Residence Permit and Aliens Card), expatriate quota, and monthly quota limits.

interior_emergency_travel.name: Emergency Travel Documents
interior_emergency_travel.description: Issuance of Emergency Travel Certificates (ETC) for Nigerians abroad needed to return home urgently.

interas_governance.name: INTERAS Digital Governance
interas_governance.description: Technological governance systems within the ministry. Covers internal portals and integrated service delivery platforms.

interior_performance_management.name: Performance Management System
interior_performance_management.description: Tracking and evaluation of ministry performance. Covers KPI monitoring for officers and agencies.

interior_legal_regulatory.name: Legal & Regulatory Framework
interior_legal_regulatory.description: Laws governing interior affairs. Includes the Immigration Act, Correctional Service Act, and Marriage Act (Federal Marriage Registry).

power_governance.name: Ministry, Leadership & Governance
power_governance.description: Leadership and policy direction of the Ministry of Power. Includes the Minister of Power's activities, NERC (Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission) regulations, and electricity acts.

electricity_gen_trans_dist.name: Electricity Generation, Transmission & Distribution
electricity_gen_trans_dist.description: The entire power value chain. Covers GenCos (Generation Companies), TCN (Transmission Company of Nigeria), DisCos (Distribution Companies), national grid stability, and power plants (Egbin, Kainji, Shiroro).

power_fuel_gas_supply.name: Fuel & Gas Supply for Power
power_fuel_gas_supply.description: Gas supply to power plants. Covers gas shortages, pipeline vandalism affecting power, and agreements with gas suppliers.

energy_pricing_tariffs.name: Energy Pricing, Tariffs & Subsidy
energy_pricing_tariffs.description: Cost of electricity. Covers Band A, Band B tariffs, electricity subsidy removal, estimated billing, and prepaid meters.

renewable_energy_transition.name: Renewable Energy & Energy Transition
renewable_energy_transition.description: Clean energy initiatives. Covers solar power, mini-grids, REA (Rural Electrification Agency), hydroelectricity, and Nigeria's energy transition plan.

power_public_sentiment.name: Public Sentiment & Citizen Complaints
power_public_sentiment.description: Public reaction to power supply. Covers blackouts, load shedding, 'up nepa', 'no light', and complaints about DisCos.

power_projects_infrastructure.name: Projects, Infrastructure & Reforms
power_projects_infrastructure.description: Major power projects and reforms. Includes the Siemens Presidential Power Initiative (PPI), construction of new substations, and transmission lines.

power_infrastructure_security.name: Critical Infrastructure Security
power_infrastructure_security.description: Protection of power assets. Covers vandalism of transmission towers, theft of transformers, and sabotage.

power_media_narrative.name: Media, Opposition & Political Narrative
power_media_narrative.description: Political discourse around power. Includes opposition criticism of power failure and media editorials on the energy crisis.

power_regional_issues.name: State & Regional Energy Issues
power_regional_issues.description: State government involvement in power (following the new Electricity Act allowing states to generate power).

power_investments_partnerships.name: Investments & International Partnerships
power_investments_partnerships.description: Funding and loans for power. Includes World Bank loans, AfDB support, and private sector investment.

power_operational_metrics.name: Operational Metrics & Performance
power_operational_metrics.description: Technical performance data. Covers peak generation (MW), system collapse frequency, and metering gap.

comms_minister_leadership.name: Minister Ministry & Leadership
comms_minister_leadership.description: Leadership of the Ministry of Communications, Innovation and Digital Economy. Includes the Minister's roadmap (3MTT), policy announcements, and strategic vision.

telecom_connectivity.name: Telecom & Connectivity
telecom_connectivity.description: Telecommunications sector. Covers MTN, Glo, Airtel, 9mobile, NCC (Nigerian Communications Commission), 5G rollout, network quality, and dropped calls.

internet_digital_access.name: Internet & Digital Access
internet_digital_access.description: Internet penetration and broadband. Covers broadband plan, right of way for fibre optics, cost of data, and ISP services.

digital_id_platforms.name: Digital ID & National Platforms
digital_id_platforms.description: Identity management. Covers NIMC (National Identity Management Commission), NIN (National Identification Number), NIN-SIM linkage, and national database.

cybersecurity_trust.name: Cybersecurity & Digital Trust
cybersecurity_trust.description: Online safety and security. Covers cyber threats, phishing, awareness campaigns, and building trust in digital platforms.

data_protection_regulation.name: Data Protection & Regulation
data_protection_regulation.description: Privacy laws and enforcement. Covers NDPC (Nigeria Data Protection Commission), GDPR compliance, and data breaches.

digital_economy_innovation.name: Digital Economy & Innovation
digital_economy_innovation.description: Growth of the tech ecosystem. Includes startups, tech hubs, 3MTT (3 Million Technical Talent) program, and digital skills training.

egovernance_services.name: E-Governance & Digital Public Services
egovernance_services.description: Digitization of government services. Includes digital public infrastructure (DPI), e-government portals, and galaxy backbone.

comms_fintech_payments.name: Fintech & Digital Payments
comms_fintech_payments.description: Intersection of tech and finance from a digital economy perspective. Covers payment gateways, tech regulation for fintechs.

cybersecurity_infrastructure_crisis.name: Cybersecurity Infrastructure & Crisis
cybersecurity_infrastructure_crisis.description: Major cyber incidents and infrastructure defense. Covers NITDA's role in crisis response and protection of critical digital assets.

digital_sovereignty.name: Digital Sovereignty & Future Infrastructure
digital_sovereignty.description: Control over national digital assets. Includes data localization, cloud sovereignty, and subsea cables.

ai_future_policy.name: AI & Future Policy
ai_future_policy.description: Artificial Intelligence strategies. Includes National AI Strategy, robotics, and emerging tech regulation.

internet_governance_rights.name: Internet Governance & Digital Rights
internet_governance_rights.description: Rights of internet users. Includes freedom of expression online, internet shutdowns, and social media regulation bills.

comms_misinformation.name: Misinformation & Information Integrity
comms_misinformation.description: Combating fake news. Includes fact-checking initiatives and government response to viral falsehoods.

comms_media_stakeholders.name: Media & Stakeholders
comms_media_stakeholders.description: Relationship with tech media and stakeholders. Includes interactions with ALTON (Association of Licensed Telecom Operators of Nigeria) and ATCON.

comms_public_sentiment.name: Public Sentiment & Policy Perception
comms_public_sentiment.description: General public view of digital policies. Includes reaction to NIN-SIM blocking and data prices.

comms_economic_impact.name: Economic Impact
comms_economic_impact.description: Contribution of ICT to GDP. Includes telecom sector revenue and digital job creation.

comms_regional_local.name: Regional & Local Signals
comms_regional_local.description: Digital access in rural vs urban areas.

defence_leadership_governance.name: Ministry Leadership & Governance
defence_leadership_governance.description: Leadership of the defense sector. Includes the Minister of Defence, Chief of Defence Staff (CDS), and Defence Headquarters (DHQ) strategic communications.

defence_operations_command.name: Defence Operations Command Structure
defence_operations_command.description: Operational command and control. Covers different theatre commands, Operation Hadin Kai, Operation Whirl Stroke, and military restructuring.

counter_insurgency_northeast.name: Counter-Insurgency – Northeast
counter_insurgency_northeast.description: War against terrorism in the Northest (Borno, Yobe, Adamawa). Covers Boko Haram, ISWAP (Islamic State West Africa Province), Sambisa Forest operations, and terrorist surrender.

counter_insurgency_northwest.name: Counter-Insurgency – Northwest
counter_insurgency_northwest.description: Security operations in Northwest (Zamfara, Kaduna, Katsina, Sokoto). Covers banditry, kidnapping, cattle rustling, and military raids on bandit camps.

counter_insurgency_middle_belt.name: Counter-Insurgency – Middle Belt
counter_insurgency_middle_belt.description: Conflict in North Central (Plateau, Benue, Niger). Covers farmer-herder crisis, communal clashes, and military peacekeeping.

multinational_regional_ops.name: Multinational & Regional Operations
multinational_regional_ops.description: Cross-border military cooperation. Includes MNJTF (Multinational Joint Task Force) operating in Lake Chad Basin.

nigerian_army_operations.name: Nigerian Army Operations & Divisions
nigerian_army_operations.description: Activities specific to the Nigerian Army. Includes Chief of Army Staff (COAS), infantry operations, and recruitment.

nigerian_navy_maritime.name: Nigerian Navy & Maritime Operations
nigerian_navy_maritime.description: Naval operations in the Niger Delta and Gulf of Guinea. Covers oil theft, illegal refining, privacy, pipeline protection, and Chief of Naval Staff (CNS).

nigerian_air_force.name: Nigerian Air Force Operations
nigerian_air_force.description: Air operations and aerial bombardment. Covers Chief of Air Staff (CAS), Super Tucano jets, airstrikes on terrorist camps, and UAV deployment.

military_equipment_procurement.name: Military Equipment & Defence Procurement
military_equipment_procurement.description: Acquisition of arms and logistics. Includes purchase of fighter jets, armored personnel carriers (APCs), DICON (Defence Industries Corporation of Nigeria), and budget allocation for weapons.

fmiti_leadership_governance.name: FMITI Leadership & Governance
fmiti_leadership_governance.description: Covers the institutional authority, ministerial leadership, administrative hierarchy, and official governance structures of the Federal Ministry of Industry, Trade & Investment — used to cluster mentions of key officials, ministry directives, executive decisions, ministerial appointments, and internal administrative communications. Distinguishes from policy outputs by focusing on persons, offices, and governance operations.
keywords: federal ministry of industry trade and investment
minister of industry trade and investment
federal ministry of commerce and industry nigeria

industrial_policy_development.name: Industrial Policy Development
industrial_policy_development.description: Covers FMITI's formulation, implementation, and review of Nigeria's core industrial policies — including the Nigeria Industrial Revolution Plan (NIRP), the National Industrial Policy, Nigeria First Policy, sector-specific manufacturing strategies, and value-chain development frameworks. Distinguishes from trade or investment policy by focusing strictly on industrialisation blueprints, manufacturing sector planning, and structural transformation of Nigeria's productive base.
keywords: nigeria industrial policy and competitiveness advisory council

trade_policy_regulation.name: Trade Policy & Regulation
trade_policy_regulation.description: Covers FMITI's design and enforcement of Nigeria's trade policy frameworks — including tariff structures, import/export regulations, WTO compliance obligations, customs policy coordination, trade dispute resolution mechanisms, and bilateral/multilateral trade agreement regulations. Distinguishes from export promotion by focusing on regulatory and compliance dimensions rather than incentive programmes.

investment_promotion_framework.name: Investment Promotion Framework
investment_promotion_framework.description: Covers FMITI's institutional mechanisms for attracting, registering, and retaining both foreign and domestic investment — primarily through the Nigerian Investment Promotion Commission (NIPC), investment summits, investor facilitation services, one-stop investment centres, FDI target programmes, and investment monitoring systems. Distinguishes from investment incentives by focusing on the promotional and facilitation infrastructure.

export_promotion_and_diversification.name: Export Promotion & Diversification
export_promotion_and_diversification.description: Covers FMITI's programmes and agency-led strategies specifically targeting the growth, diversification, and facilitation of Nigeria's non-oil exports — including NEPC operations, Export Expansion Grant, Export Development Fund, export certification, Export Business Champion schemes, and non-oil export sector programmes. Distinguishes from general trade policy by being exclusively incentive- and facilitation-driven for outbound trade.

afcfta_and_multilateral_trade.name: AfCTA & Multilateral Trade Integration
afcfta_and_multilateral_trade.description: Covers FMITI's specific leadership role in implementing the African Continental Free Trade Area agreement within Nigeria — including the National Action Committee on AfCFTA, AfCFTA protocol on digital trade, AfCFTA air cargo export corridor, AfCFTA sensitisation campaigns, and ECOWAS regional trade integration directly supervised by FMITI. Distinguishes from general trade policy by being strictly scoped to continental and multilateral free trade agreement implementation.
keywords: african continental free trade area nigeria
afcfta protocol on digital trade nigeria
afcfta protocol on trade in goods nigeria
afcfta protocol on trade in services nigeria
afcfta sme market access tool nigeria

ease_of_doing_business_and_business_refo.name: Ease of Doing Business & Business Environment Reforms
ease_of_doing_business_and_business_refo.description: Covers FMITI's coordination of Nigeria's business climate reform agenda — including PEBEC operations, National Action Plans, business registration reforms through CAC, the Paperless Service Portal, removal of bureaucratic constraints, and the Nigeria Doing Business Index. Distinguishes from investment promotion by focusing on regulatory simplification and procedural reforms rather than investment attraction programmes.

smes_manufacturing_industrial_growth.name: SMEs, Manufacturing & Industrial Growth
smes_manufacturing_industrial_growth.description: Covers FMITI's programmes targeting the growth, formalisation, financing, and capacity-building of Small and Medium Enterprises and the broader manufacturing sector in Nigeria — including SMEDAN operations, BOI industrial financing, ITF skills development, industrial training programmes, MSME development strategies, and Nigeria Commodity Exchange activities. Distinguishes from investment promotion by focusing on domestic enterprise development and productive capacity.
keywords: small and medium enterprises development agency of nigeria
raw materials research and development council
national automotive design and development council

investment_incentives_and_special_econom.name: Investment Incentives & Special Economic Zones
investment_incentives_and_special_econom.description: Covers the specific fiscal, legal, and zoning-based incentive frameworks administered or supervised by FMITI to attract and retain investors — including Pioneer Status Incentive, Economic Development Tax Incentive, tax holidays, import duty waivers, Free Trade Zones under NEPZA, Oil & Gas Free Zones under OGFZA, and Special Economic Zones. Distinguishes from investment promotion by focusing exclusively on the legal and fiscal incentive instruments and zone-based frameworks.
keywords: industrial development income tax relief act
oil and gas free zone nigeria

fmiti_public_communications_and_regulato.name: FMITI Public Communications & Regulatory Announcements
fmiti_public_communications_and_regulato.description: Covers FMITI's official public-facing communications, regulatory circulars, ministerial press releases, standards-compliance announcements, trade portal updates, publications, and social media engagements — including Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) compliance notices, Nigerian Industrial Standards (NIS) mandates, FMITI newsletter publications, FMITI website portals, and official media appearances. Distinguishes from all other clusters by focusing on the communication and dissemination layer of FMITI's operations.
